prompt: My player and slime enemies are both CharacterBody2D nodes. When a slime walks into my player, it pushes the player across the map instead of dealing damage. The slime has a CollisionShape2D on its body. How do I fix this so the slime deals damage instead of pushing?

assertions.text: Identifies body-to-body CharacterBody2D collision as root cause of pushing
Recommends removing enemy layer from player collision mask (or vice versa)
Recommends Area2D hitbox/hurtbox pattern for damage detection
Mentions area_entered fires only once on overlap start
Recommends get_overlapping_areas() for continuous contact damage
Shows correct collision layer/mask configuration with code
